markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 115-C — Emergency ambulance service vehicle

An emergency ambulance service vehicle shall be defined as an appropriately equipped motor vehicle owned or operated by an ambulance service as defined in Public Health Law § 3001 (Definitions) and used for the purpose of transporting emergency medical personnel and equipment to sick or injured persons.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
